privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for manageservice_env add_technician task by confirming that the task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new technician from scratch. Verified the expected name 'James Wilson', email 'james.wilson@company.local', login 'jwilson', and password 'ServiceDesk@2024' exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt. Discovered that the task relies on an external VLM for evaluation, as the local verifier is a stub.
